title: Live AI Q&A + Crushing it in Chess at the Same Time - Come Hang Out!
summary: Cole Medin is hosting a live AI Q&A session on Saturday where viewers can ask questions about AI coding, agents, Claude Code, and Archon. The stream will also feature chess gameplay alongside the discussion, with content released on a regular weekly schedule.
writeup: Cole Medin hosts a live Saturday Q&A on AI coding, agents, Claude Code, and Archon, taking viewer questions while playing chess.
